extracted.title: TE Meter Underperformance
extracted.description:
Texas Eastern Transmission's (TE) system has limited ability to absorb due pipeline imbalances from receipt and/or delivery point operators. TE is requiring the following meter operators to perform to scheduled quantities or confirmation restrictions will be made commensurate with anticipated physical deliveries:

Loc 73417 - COPANO PROCESSING - HOUSTON CENTRAL / COLORADO CO., TX (REC) (Colorado County, TX) Zone 79501
Loc 73608 - TGG PIPELINE - CENTRAL DELIVERY POINT (San Augustine County, TX) Zone 79502

If immediate action is not taken by the meter operator by the ID-2 Cycle, reductions for Gas Day January 23, 2026, may be required.

TE will continue to monitor performance at these meters for future gas days.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.

affectedLocations.locationName: COPANO PROCESSING - HOUSTON CENTRAL / COLORADO CO., TX (REC)
